scripts.dist: mkdir -p dist && cp -R src/client/index.html src/client/css src/client/snd dist
scripts.build: npm run clean && tsc && npm run dist && npm run bundle
scripts.build:dev: npm run clean && tsc --sourceMap && npm run dist && npm run bundle -- --sourcemap
scripts.dev: npm run build:dev && (tsc --watch --preserveWatchOutput & npm run bundle -- --watch & node --watch-path=build build/server/server.js)
scripts.prod: npm run build && npm run start
